title: adenostyles alpina subsp. briquetii
intro: Adenostyles alpina subsp. briquetii, also known as Briquet's oyster plant, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Alps. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenostyles alpina subsp. briquetii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its roots can also be used in herbal preparations.
